title: Set up Better Auth in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Install Better Auth, configure the server instance with a database adapter, create the API route handler, set up the client, and protect routes with session checks.
declaration: I will set up Better Auth — a TypeScript-first authentication library with built-in support for social providers, email/password, 2FA, and sessions. It uses your existing database (Prisma, Drizzle, etc.) for storage. If you prefer Clerk or Auth.js, say so before I begin.
